rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO VS. HERMANN STREET DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Assignee Agpm Bridge11 Holdings Llc'S Motion For Order Appointing Receiver After Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 12, 2012, line 1. Assignee Agpm Bridge11 Holdings Llc'S Motion For Order Appointing Receiver After Hearing. Grant, parties stipulated to entry of order. Order signed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., AS SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO VS. HERMANN STREET DE, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Charging Member'S Interest In Limited Liability Companies
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 12, 2012, line 1. ASSIGNEE AGPM BRIDGE11 HOLDINGS, LLC's Motion For Order Charging Member'S Interest In Limited Liability Companies. Grant, parties stipulated to entry of order. Order signed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: BENNETT MONTOYA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Order Compelling Arbiratrion; Petititon
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 12, 2012, line 2. PETITIONERs BENNETT MONTOYA, KAREN KING, and BMGV, LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY's Re-Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Order Compelling Arbitration. Deny, petitioners King and BMGV failed to show existence of arbitration agreement with respondent. Prevailing party to prepare order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINNA XIU LING ZHAO, BY THEO HONNIBALL et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 12, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s MOTION TO STRIKE THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Grant, plaintiff failed to comply with CRC 3.1320(g).= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LINNA XIU LING ZHAO, BY THEO HONNIBALL et al VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 12, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Off Calendar, moot plaintiff shows disregard for CRC rules in his pleading. See opposition to demurrer violation CRC 3.1113(d)&(f). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCES PINNOCK VS. LINDA WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs Per Ccp 425.16 And 1717
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 12, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF FRANCES PINNOCK's Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs Per Ccp 425.16 And 1717. Grant attorney fees and costs per CCP 425.16 in the amount of $16,000, plus costs if any. Deny without prejudice attorney fees per CC 1717 premature. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANCES PINNOCK VS. LINDA WONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 12, 2012, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT FRANCES PINNOCK's MOTION TO STRIKE / DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT. Hearing required to address if opposing party seeks 473.b relief. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PAYMON GHAFOURI et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A BUSINESS ENTITY et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, December 12, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Continued to January 15, 2013. Opposing party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b no later than December 31, 2012. = (501/REQ)
